description:
In `cmdReady`, the dep annotation on readyRoot epics shows `[blocked by: child1, child2, ...]` even though those are internal (within-subtree) blockers. This makes ready epics look blocked.

Fix: compute the descendant/internal-blocker set from `analyzeSubtrees` and merge it into the filter set passed to `FormatDepsFiltered`. Internal blockers should be hidden from the ready display.

Cross-ref: octo-8lz.1 in octopus repo.
title: Strip internal blocker IDs from ready display
